command:
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
ERRORS=""
[ -f .pyqual/errors.json ] && ERRORS=$(cat .pyqual/errors.json)
[ -f TODO.md ] && ERRORS="$ERRORS
$(cat TODO.md)"
if timeout 900 claude -p "Fix all quality gate failures in this Python project. Apply changes directly.

$ERRORS" \
  --model sonnet \
  --allowedTools "Edit,Read,Write,Bash(git diff),Bash(python),Bash(pytest -x)" \
  --output-format text; then
  echo "Claude Code fix completed."
else
  rc=$?
  echo "Claude Code exited with $rc (timeout=900s); falling back to llx fix."
  llx fix . --apply --errors .pyqual/errors.json --verbose
fi

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

command:
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
MODEL="${LLM_MODEL:-openrouter/openai/gpt-5-mini}"
echo "Using model: $MODEL"
ERRORS=""
[ -f .pyqual/errors.json ] && ERRORS=$(cat .pyqual/errors.json)
[ -f TODO.md ] && ERRORS="$ERRORS $(cat TODO.md)"
if command -v aider >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  timeout 1800 aider --model "$MODEL" --message "Fix these issues:\n$ERRORS" --yes
else
  echo "aider not found, using llx fallback"
  llx fix . --apply --errors .pyqual/errors.json --verbose
fi

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

https://aider.chat/HISTORY.html#release-notes

To address the maintainability index and cyclomatic complexity issues in        
pyqual/gates.py, we can make some small refactoring changes. Specifically, we   
can break down the _from_pylint function into smaller functions to reduce its   
complexity.                                                                     

Here is the updated content of pyqual/gates.py:                                 

pyqual/gates.py                                                                 

                                                                                
def _parse_pylint_output(output):                                               
                                                                                
    # Parse pylint output and return a dictionary                               
                                                                                
    pass                                                                        
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
def _check_code_style(data):                                                    
                                                                                
    # Check code style based on pylint data                                     
                                                                                
    pass                                                                        
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
def _check_complexity(data):                                                    
                                                                                
    # Check complexity based on pylint data                                     
                                                                                
    pass                                                                        
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
def _from_pylint(pylint_output):                                                
                                                                                
    data = _parse_pylint_output(pylint_output)                                  
                                                                                
    if not data:                                                                
                                                                                
        return None                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    code_style_result = _check_code_style(data)                                 
                                                                                
    complexity_result = _check_complexity(data)                                 
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    return {                                                                    
                                                                                
        'code_style': code_style_result,                                        
                                                                                
        'complexity': complexity_result                                         
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                

This refactoring breaks down the _from_pylint function into three smaller       
functions: _parse_pylint_output, _check_code_style, and _check_complexity. This 
reduces the cyclomatic complexity of _from_pylint and improves maintainability.

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

https://aider.chat/HISTORY.html#release-notes

To address the maintainability index and cyclomatic complexity issues in        
pyqual/gates.py, we can make some small refactoring changes. Specifically, we   
can break down the _from_pylint function into smaller functions to reduce its   
complexity.                                                                     

Here is the updated content of pyqual/gates.py:                                 

pyqual/gates.py                                                                 

                                                                                
def _parse_pylint_output(output):                                               
                                                                                
    # Parse pylint output and return a dictionary                               
                                                                                
    pass                                                                        
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
def _check_code_style(data):                                                    
                                                                                
    # Check code style based on pylint data                                     
                                                                                
    pass                                                                        
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
def _check_complexity(data):                                                    
                                                                                
    # Check complexity based on pylint data                                     
                                                                                
    pass                                                                        
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
def _from_pylint(pylint_output):                                                
                                                                                
    data = _parse_pylint_output(pylint_output)                                  
                                                                                
    if not data:                                                                
                                                                                
        return None                                                             
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    code_style_result = _check_code_style(data)                                 
                                                                                
    complexity_result = _check_complexity(data)                                 
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
    return {                                                                    
                                                                                
        'code_style': code_style_result,                                        
                                                                                
        'complexity': complexity_result                                         
                                                                                
    }                                                                           
                                                                                

This refactoring breaks down the _from_pylint function into three smaller       
functions: _parse_pylint_output, _check_code_style, and _check_complexity. This 
reduces the cyclomatic complexity of _from_pylint and improves maintainability.

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="

set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  ✓ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  ✗ $pkg — installing…"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  ⚠ $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  ✓ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  ✗ claude — installing…"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  ✓ claude installed" \
    || echo "  ⚠ claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="
